outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Live updates: Iran war news, Kuwaiti oil tanker attack, Trump threatens Iran's energy facilities
outlets.summary: Day 32 liveblog covering cluster munition strike on central Israel, Al-Salmi tanker attack, Trump ceasefire signals, Pentagon briefing.

outlets.name: CNN Analysis
outlets.headline: Behind the scenes and in front of cameras, Hegseth serving as top cheerleader for military power in Iran war
outlets.summary: CNN examines Hegseth's role as public face of Iran war amid investment controversy and rift with Rubio over troop deployment.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Iran's strike wounded over a dozen U.S. personnel and hit valuable jets in Saudi Arabia
outlets.summary: NPR reports on Iranian strikes damaging US assets in Saudi Arabia, Trump escalation threats, and diplomatic stalemate.

outlets.name: CBS News
outlets.headline: Trump renews threat to Iran's power plants as war sends oil prices soaring again
outlets.summary: Coverage of Trump's energy infrastructure threats, gas crossing $4/gal, and Hormuz toll plan implications.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Live updates: Trump considers sending up to 10,000 more troops to Middle East during Iran war
outlets.summary: Fox covers troop deployment considerations, Trump ceasefire signals, and Rubio's 'weeks not months' timeline.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: BBC, CNN, NYT used 'war crime' label for US, Israel, watchdog says
outlets.summary: CAMERA watchdog found 88% of 'war crime' labels directed at US/Israel, zero directed solely at Iran.

outlets.name: FDD
outlets.headline: Contra Pope Leo, Catholic Just War Doctrine Supports Iran Strikes
outlets.summary: Foundation for Defense of Democracies argues Catholic Just War doctrine supports military action against Iran, rebutting Pope Leo's Palm Sunday address.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war: What is happening on day 32 of US-Israel attacks?
outlets.summary: Comprehensive Day 32 overview: cluster munition strike, UNIFIL deaths, Hormuz toll plan, Rubio interview, diplomatic efforts.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Pentagon denies Hegseth's broker sought defence investment before Iran war
outlets.summary: Pentagon demands FT retraction. FT says 'We stand by our reporting.' Hegseth-Rubio tensions over troop deployment.

outlets.name: Axios
outlets.headline: Pope vs. Trump: Pontiff takes aim at U.S. policies
outlets.summary: Pope Leo's Palm Sunday address seen as direct challenge to Trump's war justification.

outlets.name: France 24
outlets.headline: Three UN peacekeepers killed in south Lebanon in 24 hours
outlets.summary: First UNIFIL fatalities of the conflict. France seeks emergency UNSC meeting.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Eight lightly hurt, damage reported as Iran fires missile salvos at central Israel
outlets.summary: Day 32 liveblog: cluster munition damage in Bnei Brak/Petah Tikva, 5 IDF soldiers killed in Lebanon March 30, Knesset budget.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Israel-Iran War Day 31: IDF Attack on Lebanese Army Checkpoint Kills One Soldier
outlets.summary: First strike on permanent LAF installation. Trump's Hormuz endgame. 5 IDF soldiers killed.

outlets.name: Israel Hayom
outlets.headline: 4 IDF soldiers killed in southern Lebanon ambush
outlets.summary: Nahal Brigade ambush details. Separate anti-tank missile kills Sgt. Ben Zion, 19.

outlets.name: NCRI
outlets.headline: Iran News in Brief — March 31, 2026
outlets.summary: Opposition coverage of strike damage across Iran, parliament toll plan, leadership casualties.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: Iran's unseen new leader issues first message in writing
outlets.summary: Mojtaba Khamenei communication amid decimated IRGC leadership.

outlets.name: Tehran Times
outlets.headline: FM Araghchi: This is a war on the entire Islamic region
outlets.summary: Araghchi rejects ceasefire terms, demands permanent attack halt and reparations, insists Lebanon included in any deal.
